[33mcommit 1a60663c1f82a417c8f2e4ddd9fa911fdc331763[m[33m ([m[1;36mHEAD[m[33m -> [m[1;32mmain[m[33m, [m[1;31morigin/main[m[33m, [m[1;31morigin/HEAD[m[33m)[m
Author: Abhineeth Duddela <abhineeth78@gmail.com>
Date:   Wed Jun 17 03:45:30 2026 +0000

    initial version

[33mcommit c7ea5bb84f3a85c30059df4d941bef95df46d0da[m
Author: Abhineeth Duddela <abhineeth78@gmail.com>
Date:   Tue Jun 16 22:32:24 2026 -0500

    Initial commit
